component.name: Folio
Folio
component.summary: Modern e-book reader with TTS support

description.p: Folio is a modern e-book reader built with GTK4 and libadwaita. It supports all major e-book formats including EPUB, PDF, MOBI, and comic books. The built-in text-to-speech feature uses Piper for high-quality offline speech synthesis.

Folio är en modern e-boksläsare byggd med GTK4 och libadwaita. Den stöder alla stora e-boksformat inklusive EPUB, PDF, MOBI och serietidningar. Den inbyggda text-till-tal-funktionen använder Piper för högkvalitativ offline talsyntes.

ul.li: Clean, responsive interface with light/dark theme support
Support for EPUB, PDF, MOBI, FB2, CBZ/CBR formats
Text-to-speech with Swedish and English voices
Customizable font sizes and reading preferences
Book library management with cover thumbnails
Remember reading position for each book
